name: AREA

meta.data_required: ordered periods + one non-negative quantity series (optional context line)

use_when: one quantity over time where the VOLUME matters (output, throughput, stock)
emphasizing magnitude of change, not just direction
at most one context reference line alongside
not_when: comparing several series (use CH-TIM-01; overlapping areas lie)
rates or ratios (area implies quantity; use CH-TIM-01)
composition over time (CH-TIM-04 stacked area when built)

data_shape.title: string, action title stating the finding with a number
data_shape.eyebrow: string caps, rendered only when the DL chrome asks for it
data_shape.unit: string, appears once, on the top y tick label
data_shape.series: exactly one role 'key' (the filled area) + optional 'context' reference lines
data_shape.annotation: {text, series, index, tx, ty, anchor}, optional

scale.algorithm: raw = max/target_ticks; mag = 10^floor(log10(raw)); step = first nice_steps*mag >= raw; top = ceil(max/step)*step

rules: y starts at zero, no exceptions (a cut baseline lies twice as hard with fill)
one filled series only; fill is primary at the fixed opacity, stroke is primary
series labeled at line ends, never a legend
qa: fill opacity equals the spec value
series labels at line ends, no legend
title states a finding with a number
